debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝⁵ : CommRing K
inst✝⁴ : ValuativeRel K
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : CommRing L
inst✝² : ValuativeRel L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : ValuativeExtension K L
⊢ ⟨(algebraMap K L) ↑1, ⋯⟩ = 1

failed_attempts:
by
    simp [one_smul]
    <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
    <;> aesop

map_add' := sorry
    map_one' := sorry

by
      simp [add_def, mul_def, algebraMap]
      <;>
      (try cases r <;> cases s <;> simp_all [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
      <;>
      (try { ring_nf at * <;> norm_num })
      <;>
      (try { simp_all [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] })
      <;>
      (try { linarith })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  }

by
      simp [algebraMap_one]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, algebraMap_apply]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_one, map_one]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_cast) <;>
      (try simp_all [val_one]) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₁ := valuation_one
          simp_all [val_one]
          <;>
          (try nlinarith)
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [val_one]
          <;>
          (try nlinarith)
        })
    map_mul' := by
      intro r s
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, algebraMap_apply, mul_assoc]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_mul, map_mul]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_cast) <;>
      (try simp_all [val_mul]) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₁ := valuation_mul (algebraMap K L r.1) (algebraMap K L s.1)
          simp_all [val_mul]
          <;>
          (try nlinarith)
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [val_mul]
          <;>
          (try nlinarith)
        })
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap, Subtype.ext_iff, one_smul]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by sorry
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [algebraMap]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [one_mul]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_one])
  }

by
      have h₁ : (1 : 𝒪[L]) = ⟨(1 : L), by
        have h₂ : valuation L (1 : L) = 0 := by
          simp [valuation.map_one]
        simp_all [Valuation.mem_integer_iff]
        ⟩ := by
        rfl
      simp_all [h₁]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_apply]) <;>
      (try simp_all [algebraMap_eq_smul_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Submodule.smul_def]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_apply]) <;>
      (try simp_all [algebraMap_eq_smul_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Submodule.smul_def]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_apply]) <;>
      (try simp_all [algebraMap_eq_smul_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Submodule.smul_def])
    }

map_add' := sorry
    map_one' := sorry

by
      simp [Algebra.map_one]
      <;>
      congr 1 <;>
      ext <;>
      simp [Algebra.map_one]
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.val_one]
      <;>
      simp_all [Algebra.map_one]
  }

by
      -- We need to show that algebraMap 𝒪[K] 𝒪[L] 1 = 1
      -- This is trivially true because 1 maps to 1
      simp [algebraMap]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try simp_all [one_mul]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [map_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [map_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [map_one]) <;>
      (try simp_all [map_one])
    }
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;> simp_all [algebraMap_one]
      <;> norm_num
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Valuation.mem_integer_iff])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [valuation_one])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [le_refl])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [le_of_lt])
    , map_mul' := by
      intro x y
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, mul_smul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [algebraMap_mul]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> try simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;> try simp_all [mul_comm]
      <;> try simp_all [mul_left_comm]
  }

by
      -- Prove that the algebra map sends 1 to 1
      simp [Algebra.map_one]
      <;>
      norm_cast
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Valuation.map_one]
      <;>
      linarith
  }

by
      -- We need to show that the map of 1 is 1.
      -- Since algebraMap K L is a ring homomorphism, it maps 1 to 1.
      -- The valuation of 1 in L is 0, which is ≤ 0, so it is in the ring of integers.
      have h₁ : (algebraMap K L (1 : K)) = (1 : L) := by
        simp [Algebra.algebraMap_one]
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_one]) <;>
      (try norm_cast) <;>
      (try simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_one]) <;>
      (try linarith)
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      simp_all [algebraMap]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      -- Prove that the algebra map respects the multiplicative identity
      simp [Algebra.map_one]
      <;>
      simp_all [Valuation.map_one]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [Algebra.algebraMap_apply]
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try aesop
  }

by
      -- Prove that the algebra map preserves the multiplicative identity.
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
    ext
    simp [map_one]
